title: Madame
writer: Victorien Sardou, Émile Moreau, Jean Ferry
actors: Sophia Loren, Robert Hossein, Renaud Mary
plot: Catherine, a laundress, joins lover Lefevre in war. Their heroics help Napoleon win. As a reward, they're granted nobility. Catherine's lack of courtly etiquette shocks high society, but she remains authentic despite her new rank.
